'''Rhigar 3''' was the outermost of the three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]] in the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]]. Rhigar was home to the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] which [[Jagged Fel|Jag Fel]] once attended. Seen from the surface of the world it orbited, Rhigar 3 appeared blue in [[Color/Legends|color]], and it was probably predominantly, or even totally, covered in [[Water/Legends|water]].<ref name="RSBF" />

Although its orbit was beyond those of [[Asdroni]] and the inner [[Rhigar's forested moon|forest moon]], Rhigar 3 had a climate that was almost tropical, and [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] with impressive coral reefs.<ref name="DJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Most of the available information on Rhigar 3, including its name, is given in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''—in ''Red Sky, Blue Flame'', the third moon of the academy world is simply described as "distant" and "blue". It is from this one mention of the name of Rhigar 3 that the name [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]] has been inferred for the academy world itself. The name of the planet was later confirmed in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
